mapper.insert: insert into tbl_oauth (provider_id, provider, profile_url, member_id) values (#{providerId}, #{provider}, #{profileURL}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: select m.id, m.member_email, m.member_name, m.member_password, m.member_handle, m.member_phone, m.member_region, m.member_status, m.member_role, m.push_enabled, m.member_language, m.birth_date, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, m.last_login_at, o.provider_id, o.provider, o.profile_url from tbl_member m join tbl_oauth o on m.id = o.member_id where (m.member_email = #{loginId} or m.member_phone = #{loginId}) and m.member_password = #{memberPassword} and m.member_status = 'active' and o.provider = #{provider}

select m.id, m.member_email, m.member_password, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, m.member_phone, m.member_bio, m.member_region, m.member_status, m.member_role, m.push_enabled, m.birth_date, m.created_datetime, m.updated_datetime, m.last_login_at, m.member_name, m.member_language, m.member_login_verified, o.provider_id, o.provider, o.profile_url from tbl_member m join tbl_oauth o on m.id = o.member_id where (m.member_email = #{loginId} or m.member_phone = #{loginId}) and m.member_status = 'active' and o.provider = #{provider}
